risk_note.tr: Yalnizca okuma operasyonlari. Dump dosyalari acilir, sistem degisiklik yapilmaz.
risk_note.en: Read-only operations. Dump files inspected, no system changes.

prerequisites.tr: BSOD sonrasi en az bir minidump (C:\Windows\Minidump altinda)
prerequisites.en: At least one minidump after a BSOD (in C:\Windows\Minidump)

body.tr: NirSoft BlueScreenView indir, calistir; mini dump'lari listeler. 'Caused By Driver' kolonu suclu surucuyu gosterir. URL: nirsoft.net/utils/blue_screen_view.html
body.en: Download NirSoft BlueScreenView, run; lists minidumps. 'Caused By Driver' column shows the culprit. URL: nirsoft.net/utils/blue_screen_view.html

body.tr: Microsoft Store'dan 'WinDbg Preview' indir. File > Open dump file > C:\Windows\Minidump\*.dmp. Komut: !analyze -v - tam stack ve probable cause verir.
body.en: Install 'WinDbg Preview' from Microsoft Store. File > Open dump file > C:\Windows\Minidump\*.dmp. Command: !analyze -v - gives full stack and probable cause.

body.tr: MEMORY_MANAGEMENT > RAM modul testi (MemTest86). DRIVER_IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL > surucu/driver guncelleme veya rollback. CRITICAL_PROCESS_DIED > sistem dosyasi bozulmasi (SFC + DISM).
body.en: MEMORY_MANAGEMENT > test RAM modules (MemTest86). DRIVER_IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL > update/rollback driver. CRITICAL_PROCESS_DIED > corrupt system file (SFC + DISM).

body.tr: BSOD'ler tekrarliyorsa: MemTest86 (RAM, en az 4 pas), Prime95 (CPU, 1 saat), FurMark (GPU, 30 dk), CrystalDiskInfo (SMART). Birden fazla BSOD farkli driver'da > donanim sorunu olabilir.
body.en: If BSODs recurring: MemTest86 (RAM, 4+ passes), Prime95 (CPU, 1h), FurMark (GPU, 30 min), CrystalDiskInfo (SMART). Multiple BSODs across different drivers > likely hardware.
